nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 恰帕斯州
nodes.summary: 恰帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联34种鸟类，包括角冠雉、小灰頭稚冠雉、眼斑吐綬雞等34种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 墨西哥
nodes.summary: 墨西哥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、棕穴䳍、草黃樹鴨等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Grey silky-flycatcher
nodes.summary: Grey silky-flycatcher（Grey silky-flycatcher，学名 Ptiliogonys cinereus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: Pine–oak forest
nodes.summary: Pine–oak forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括Mottled owl、白喉蓝头鹊、小蓝头鹊等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 危地马拉
nodes.summary: 危地马拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联128种鸟类，包括山冠雉、White-bellied chachalaca、Yucatan bobwhite等128种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 美国
nodes.summary: 美国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联58种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、白尾雷鸟等58种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The grey silky-flycatcher (Ptiliogonys cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Ptiliogonatidae. It is found in Guatemala and Mexico and as a vagrant in Texas, United States.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The grey silky-flycatcher (Ptiliogonys cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Ptiliogonatidae. It is found in Guatemala and Mexico and as a vagrant in Texas, United States.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: molybdophanes: from Chiapas in southern Mexico south into south-central Guatemala The species has also been recorded as a vagrant in southern and western Texas. The grey silky-flycatcher inhabits pine, pine-oak, and juniper forest in the subtropical and temperate zones. It also occurs in pine savanna and rarely in cloudforest. Sources differ on its overall elevational range; one states it is and another mostly and lower in winter
